---
title: "Pengantar Metode Statistika Tugas 3"
author: "Sala Jalaludin"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    toc_float:
        collapsed: true
        smooth_scroll: true
    theme: cosmo
---

# Load Library
```{r}
library(caret)
library(randomForest)
library(e1071)
library(MLmetrics)
library(nnet)
```

# Input Data
```{r}
train <- read.csv("dataset_A.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
test  <- read.csv("dataset_B.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

cat("Dimensi Dataset A:", dim(train), "\n")
cat("Dimensi Dataset B:", dim(test),  "\n")
```

# Eksplorasi Data
```{r}
cat("\n=== TIPE DATA ===\n")
str(train)

cat("\n=== DISTRIBUSI TARGET (y) ===\n")
tabel_y <- table(train$y)
print(tabel_y)
print(prop.table(tabel_y))

cat("\n=== JUMLAH 'unknown' PER KOLOM (TRAIN) ===\n")
unknown_train <- sapply(train, function(x) sum(x == "unknown", na.rm = TRUE))
print(unknown_train[unknown_train > 0])

cat("\n=== JUMLAH 'unknown' PER KOLOM (TEST) ===\n")
unknown_test <- sapply(test, function(x) sum(x == "unknown", na.rm = TRUE))
print(unknown_test[unknown_test > 0])

cat("\n=== STATISTIK DESKRIPTIF NUMERIK ===\n")
print(summary(train[, sapply(train, is.numeric)]))
```

# Preprocessing Data
```{r}
# Identifikasi kolom karakter
char_cols_train <- names(train)[sapply(train, is.character)]
char_cols_test  <- names(test)[sapply(test,  is.character)]

# Ganti "unknown" ke NA hanya di kolom karakter
for (col in char_cols_train) {
  train[[col]][train[[col]] == "unknown"] <- NA
}
for (col in char_cols_test) {
  test[[col]][test[[col]] == "unknown"] <- NA
}
# Verifikasi
cat("NA di kolom numerik train:", sum(is.na(train[, sapply(train, is.numeric)])), "\n")
cat("NA di kolom kategorik train:", sum(is.na(train[, sapply(train, is.character)])), "\n")

# Imputasi NA dengan modus (DARI TRAIN)
get_mode <- function(x) {
  x  <- na.omit(x)
  ux <- unique(x)
  ux[which.max(tabulate(match(x, ux)))]
}

# Simpan modus dari train untuk dipakai juga pada test
modus_train <- list()
for (col in char_cols_train) {
  if (any(is.na(train[[col]]))) {
    modus_train[[col]] <- get_mode(train[[col]])
    train[[col]][is.na(train[[col]])] <- modus_train[[col]]
  }
}

# Imputasi test menggunakan modus dari train
for (col in char_cols_test) {
  if (any(is.na(test[[col]]))) {
    if (!is.null(modus_train[[col]])) {
      test[[col]][is.na(test[[col]])] <- modus_train[[col]]
    } else {
      test[[col]][is.na(test[[col]])] <- get_mode(test[[col]])
    }
  }
}

cat("\nNA tersisa setelah imputasi (Train):", sum(is.na(train)), "\n")
cat("NA tersisa setelah imputasi (Test):", sum(is.na(test)),   "\n")

# Verifikasi kolom numerik
num_cols_check <- c("emp.var.rate", "cons.price.idx", "cons.conf.idx", "euribor3m", "nr.employed")
for (col in num_cols_check) {
  if (col %in% names(train)) {
    cat(col, ":", range(train[[col]], na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
  }
}

# Feature Engineering
train$is_contacted_before <- ifelse(train$pdays == 999, "no", "yes")
test$is_contacted_before  <- ifelse(test$pdays  == 999, "no", "yes")

# Feature Selection
kolom_hapus <- c("duration", "emp.var.rate", "nr.employed")
train <- train[, !(names(train) %in% kolom_hapus)]
test  <- test[,  !(names(test)  %in% kolom_hapus)]

cat("\nVariabel final:\n")
print(names(train))

# Konversi ke Factor
char_cols <- names(train)[sapply(train, is.character)]
train[char_cols] <- lapply(train[char_cols], as.factor)
char_cols_test <- names(test)[sapply(test, is.character)]
test[char_cols_test] <- lapply(test[char_cols_test], as.factor)

# Samakan levels test dengan train
for (col in names(test)) {
  if (is.factor(test[[col]]) && col %in% names(train) && is.factor(train[[col]])) {
    test[[col]] <- factor(test[[col]], levels = levels(train[[col]]))
  }
}

cat("\nPreprocessing selesai. Cek tipe data:\n")
str(train)
```

# Split data dan handle class imbalance
```{r}
set.seed(123)
trainIndex    <- createDataPartition(train$y, p = 0.8, list = FALSE)
data_train    <- train[ trainIndex, ]
data_val      <- train[-trainIndex, ]

cat("\nProporsi sebelum downsampling:\n")
print(prop.table(table(data_train$y)))

train_balanced <- downSample(
  x     = data_train[, -which(names(data_train) == "y")],
  y     = data_train$y,
  yname = "y"
)
cat("Setelah downsampling:", table(train_balanced$y), "\n")
```

# Scaling data
```{r}
numeric_cols <- names(train_balanced)[sapply(train_balanced, is.numeric)]
scaler <- preProcess(
  train_balanced[, numeric_cols, drop = FALSE],
  method = c("center", "scale")
)

scale_df <- function(df, scaler, num_cols) {
  cols <- intersect(num_cols, names(df))
  df[, cols] <- predict(scaler, df[, cols, drop = FALSE])
  df
}

train_sc <- scale_df(train_balanced, scaler, numeric_cols)
val_sc   <- scale_df(data_val,       scaler, numeric_cols)
test_sc  <- scale_df(test,           scaler, numeric_cols)
```

# Model Development
```{r}
# Model Random Forest
set.seed(123)
model_rf <- randomForest(
  y ~ ., data = train_sc,
  mtry = floor(sqrt(ncol(train_sc) - 1)),
  ntree = 300,
  importance = TRUE
)

# Model SVM
set.seed(123)
model_svm <- svm(
  y ~ ., data = train_sc,
  kernel = "radial",
  cost = 1,
  gamma = 0.1,
  probability = TRUE
)

# Model ANN
set.seed(123)
model_ann <- nnet(
  y ~ ., data = train_sc,
  size = 10,
  decay = 0.01,
  maxit = 500,
  trace = FALSE
)
```

# Evaluasi Model
```{r}
eval_model <- function(pred, actual, nama) {
  pred   <- factor(pred, levels = levels(actual))
  cm     <- confusionMatrix(pred, actual, positive = "yes")
  f1     <- F1_Score(y_pred = pred, y_true = actual, positive = "yes")
  data.frame(
    Model     = nama,
    Accuracy  = round(cm$overall["Accuracy"],       4),
    Precision = round(cm$byClass["Pos Pred Value"], 4),
    Recall    = round(cm$byClass["Sensitivity"],    4),
    F1_Score  = round(f1, 4),
    row.names = NULL
  )
}

pred_rf  <- predict(model_rf,  newdata = val_sc)
pred_svm <- predict(model_svm, newdata = val_sc)
pred_ann <- factor(
  predict(model_ann, newdata = val_sc, type = "class"),
  levels = levels(val_sc$y)
)

hasil_eval <- rbind(
  eval_model(pred_rf,  val_sc$y, "Random Forest"),
  eval_model(pred_svm, val_sc$y, "SVM"),
  eval_model(pred_ann, val_sc$y, "ANN")
)
# Tampilkan hasil evaluasi
cat("\n[ HASIL EVALUASI KOMPARATIF ]\n")
print(hasil_eval, row.names = FALSE)
```

# Kalibrasi Treshold
```{r}
# Ambil probabilitas dari semua model di data VALIDASI
# Random Forest
prob_rf_val  <- predict(model_rf,  newdata = val_sc, type = "prob")[, "yes"]

# SVM (probability = TRUE saat training — sudah di-set)
prob_svm_raw <- predict(model_svm, newdata = val_sc, probability = TRUE)
prob_svm_val <- attr(prob_svm_raw, "probabilities")[, "yes"]

# ANN
prob_ann_val <- as.numeric(predict(model_ann, newdata = val_sc, type = "raw"))

# Fungsi threshold optimal
find_best_threshold <- function(probs, actual, grid = seq(0.1, 0.9, by = 0.01)) {
  f1_vals <- sapply(grid, function(t) {
    pred_t <- factor(ifelse(probs > t, "yes", "no"), levels = levels(actual))
    tryCatch(
      F1_Score(y_pred = pred_t, y_true = actual, positive = "yes"),
      error = function(e) 0
    )
  })
  list(
    threshold = grid[which.max(f1_vals)],
    f1        = round(max(f1_vals), 4)
  )
}

best_rf  <- find_best_threshold(prob_rf_val,  val_sc$y)
best_svm <- find_best_threshold(prob_svm_val, val_sc$y)
best_ann <- find_best_threshold(prob_ann_val, val_sc$y)

cat("Random Forest — Threshold:", best_rf$threshold,  "| F1:", best_rf$f1,  "\n")
cat("SVM           — Threshold:", best_svm$threshold, "| F1:", best_svm$f1, "\n")
cat("ANN           — Threshold:", best_ann$threshold, "| F1:", best_ann$f1, "\n")

# Evaluasi ulang
eval_with_threshold <- function(probs, actual, threshold, nama) {
  pred <- factor(ifelse(probs > threshold, "yes", "no"), levels = levels(actual))
  cm   <- confusionMatrix(pred, actual, positive = "yes")
  f1   <- F1_Score(y_pred = pred, y_true = actual, positive = "yes")
  data.frame(
    Model       = nama,
    Threshold   = threshold,
    Accuracy    = round(cm$overall["Accuracy"],       4),
    Precision   = round(cm$byClass["Pos Pred Value"], 4),
    Recall      = round(cm$byClass["Sensitivity"],    4),
    F1_Score    = round(f1, 4),
    row.names   = NULL
  )
}

hasil_kalibrasi <- rbind(
  eval_with_threshold(prob_rf_val,  val_sc$y, best_rf$threshold,  "Random Forest (Kalibrasi)"),
  eval_with_threshold(prob_svm_val, val_sc$y, best_svm$threshold, "SVM (Kalibrasi)"),
  eval_with_threshold(prob_ann_val, val_sc$y, best_ann$threshold, "ANN (Kalibrasi)")
)

cat("\n=== HASIL EVALUASI SETELAH KALIBRASI THRESHOLD ===\n")
print(hasil_kalibrasi, row.names = FALSE)

# Confusion matrix model terbaik (SVM)
pred_svm_best <- factor(
  ifelse(prob_svm_val > best_svm$threshold, "yes", "no"),
  levels = levels(val_sc$y)
)
cat("\n=== CONFUSION MATRIX — SVM (Model Terbaik) ===\n")
print(confusionMatrix(pred_svm_best, val_sc$y, positive = "yes"))
```

# Prediksi Final dan Submission
```{r}

# Konfirmasi model terbaik
cat("=== PERBANDINGAN FINAL SETELAH KALIBRASI ===\n")
cat("Random Forest — Threshold: 0.73 | F1: 0.4943 ← TERPILIH\n")
cat("SVM           — Threshold: 0.78 | F1: 0.4935\n")
cat("ANN           — Threshold: 0.77 | F1: 0.4596\n")

# Ambil probabilitas RF pada Dataset B
prob_rf_test <- predict(model_rf, newdata = test_sc, type = "prob")[, "yes"]

# Terapkan threshold optimal RF
prediksi_final_rf <- factor(
  ifelse(prob_rf_test > 0.73, "yes", "no"),
  levels = c("no", "yes")
)

# Buat dataframe submission
hasil_submission_rf <- data.frame(
  id     = seq_len(nrow(test_sc)),
  y_pred = prediksi_final_rf
)

# Cek distribusi prediksi
cat("\n=== DISTRIBUSI PREDIKSI DATASET B (Random Forest - Final) ===\n")
print(table(hasil_submission_rf$y_pred))
cat("\nProporsi:\n")
print(round(prop.table(table(hasil_submission_rf$y_pred)), 3))
# Ekspektasi: "yes" ~10-18%

# Preview
cat("\nPreview 10 baris pertama:\n")
print(head(hasil_submission_rf, 10))

# Export ke CSV
write.csv(hasil_submission_rf,
          "Hasil_Prediksi_Dataset_B_RF_FINAL.csv",
          row.names = FALSE,
          quote     = FALSE)

cat("\n[SELESAI] File 'Hasil_Prediksi_Dataset_B_RF_FINAL.csv' berhasil disimpan!\n")
```

```{r}
# ── 1. SCALING ULANG dari data_train asli ────────────────────────────────
numeric_cols <- names(data_train)[sapply(data_train, is.numeric)]

scaler_fix <- preProcess(data_train[, numeric_cols, drop = FALSE],
                         method = c("center", "scale"))

scale_df <- function(df, scaler, num_cols) {
  cols <- intersect(num_cols, names(df))
  df[, cols] <- predict(scaler, df[, cols, drop = FALSE])
  df
}

train_fix_sc <- scale_df(data_train, scaler_fix, numeric_cols)
val_fix_sc   <- scale_df(data_val,   scaler_fix, numeric_cols)
test_fix_sc  <- scale_df(test,       scaler_fix, numeric_cols)

# ── 2. BANGUN MODEL RF DENGAN CLASS WEIGHT ───────────────────────────────
bobot_no  <- 1 / sum(data_train$y == "no")
bobot_yes <- 1 / sum(data_train$y == "yes")

set.seed(123)
model_rf_fix <- randomForest(
  y ~ .,
  data      = train_fix_sc,
  mtry      = floor(sqrt(ncol(train_fix_sc) - 1)),
  ntree     = 300,
  classwt   = c("no" = bobot_no, "yes" = bobot_yes),
  importance = TRUE
)

# ── 3. KALIBRASI THRESHOLD ───────────────────────────────────────────────
prob_rf_val_fix <- predict(model_rf_fix, newdata = val_fix_sc, type = "prob")[, "yes"]

threshold_grid <- seq(0.10, 0.90, by = 0.01)
f1_grid <- sapply(threshold_grid, function(t) {
  pred_t <- factor(ifelse(prob_rf_val_fix > t, "yes", "no"),
                   levels = levels(val_fix_sc$y))
  tryCatch(
    F1_Score(y_pred = pred_t, y_true = val_fix_sc$y, positive = "yes"),
    error = function(e) 0
  )
})

best_t  <- threshold_grid[which.max(f1_grid)]
best_f1 <- round(max(f1_grid), 4)
cat("Threshold Optimal:", best_t, "| F1:", best_f1, "\n")

# ── 4. EVALUASI DI DATA VALIDASI ─────────────────────────────────────────
pred_val_fix <- factor(
  ifelse(prob_rf_val_fix > best_t, "yes", "no"),
  levels = levels(val_fix_sc$y)
)
cm_fix <- confusionMatrix(pred_val_fix, val_fix_sc$y, positive = "yes")
print(cm_fix)

# ── 5. PREDIKSI DATASET B ────────────────────────────────────────────────
prob_test_fix <- predict(model_rf_fix, newdata = test_fix_sc, type = "prob")[, "yes"]

prediksi_fix <- factor(
  ifelse(prob_test_fix > best_t, "yes", "no"),
  levels = c("no", "yes")
)

cat("\n=== DISTRIBUSI PREDIKSI DATASET B (SETELAH PERBAIKAN) ===\n")
print(table(prediksi_fix))
cat("\nProporsi:\n")
print(round(prop.table(table(prediksi_fix)), 3))
# Harusnya: "yes" ~ 0.10 - 0.18

# ── 6. EXPORT ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
hasil_final <- data.frame(
  id     = seq_len(nrow(test_fix_sc)),
  y_pred = prediksi_fix
)

write.csv(hasil_final,
          "Hasil_Prediksi_Dataset_B_FINAL.csv",
          row.names = FALSE,
          quote     = FALSE)

cat("\n[SELESAI] File berhasil disimpan!\n")
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# SOLUSI FINAL: RF TANPA RESAMPLING, TANPA CLASS WEIGHT
# ============================================================

# ── 1. SCALING dari data_train ASLI ──────────────────────────────────────
numeric_cols <- names(data_train)[sapply(data_train, is.numeric)]

scaler_final <- preProcess(data_train[, numeric_cols, drop = FALSE],
                            method = c("center", "scale"))

scale_df <- function(df, scaler, num_cols) {
  cols <- intersect(num_cols, names(df))
  df[, cols] <- predict(scaler, df[, cols, drop = FALSE])
  df
}

train_final_sc <- scale_df(data_train, scaler_final, numeric_cols)
val_final_sc   <- scale_df(data_val,   scaler_final, numeric_cols)
test_final_sc  <- scale_df(test,       scaler_final, numeric_cols)

cat("Distribusi kelas TRAIN (asli, tanpa resampling):\n")
print(prop.table(table(train_final_sc$y)))
# Harusnya: no ~0.88, yes ~0.12

# ── 2. BANGUN MODEL RF — MURNI TANPA MANIPULASI ──────────────────────────
set.seed(123)
model_rf_final <- randomForest(
  y ~ .,
  data       = train_final_sc,
  mtry       = floor(sqrt(ncol(train_final_sc) - 1)),
  ntree      = 500,
  importance = TRUE
  # TIDAK ada classwt, TIDAK ada resampling
)

cat("\nModel RF (tanpa resampling) selesai dibangun.\n")

# ── 3. CEK PROBABILITAS DI VALIDASI ──────────────────────────────────────
prob_rf_final_val <- predict(model_rf_final, 
                              newdata = val_final_sc, 
                              type = "prob")[, "yes"]

cat("\nRingkasan probabilitas prediksi (validasi):\n")
print(summary(prob_rf_final_val))
# Harusnya: mean ~0.10-0.15, max ~0.70-0.90

# ── 4. KALIBRASI THRESHOLD OPTIMAL ───────────────────────────────────────
threshold_grid <- seq(0.10, 0.60, by = 0.01)

f1_grid <- sapply(threshold_grid, function(t) {
  pred_t <- factor(ifelse(prob_rf_final_val > t, "yes", "no"),
                   levels = levels(val_final_sc$y))
  tryCatch(
    F1_Score(y_pred = pred_t, y_true = val_final_sc$y, positive = "yes"),
    error = function(e) 0
  )
})

best_t_final  <- threshold_grid[which.max(f1_grid)]
best_f1_final <- round(max(f1_grid), 4)

cat("\nThreshold Optimal:", best_t_final, "| F1:", best_f1_final, "\n")

# ── 5. EVALUASI DETAIL DI VALIDASI ───────────────────────────────────────
pred_val_final <- factor(
  ifelse(prob_rf_final_val > best_t_final, "yes", "no"),
  levels = levels(val_final_sc$y)
)

cm_final <- confusionMatrix(pred_val_final, val_final_sc$y, positive = "yes")
f1_final <- F1_Score(y_pred = pred_val_final, 
                      y_true = val_final_sc$y, 
                      positive = "yes")

cat("\n=== CONFUSION MATRIX — RF FINAL ===\n")
print(cm_final)

cat("\n=== METRIK EVALUASI FINAL ===\n")
cat("Accuracy :", round(cm_final$overall["Accuracy"], 4), "\n")
cat("Precision:", round(cm_final$byClass["Pos Pred Value"], 4), "\n")
cat("Recall   :", round(cm_final$byClass["Sensitivity"], 4), "\n")
cat("F1-Score :", round(f1_final, 4), "\n")

# ── 6. PREDIKSI DATASET B ────────────────────────────────────────────────
prob_test_final <- predict(model_rf_final, 
                            newdata = test_final_sc, 
                            type = "prob")[, "yes"]

prediksi_final <- factor(
  ifelse(prob_test_final > best_t_final, "yes", "no"),
  levels = c("no", "yes")
)

cat("\n=== DISTRIBUSI PREDIKSI DATASET B ===\n")
print(table(prediksi_final))
cat("\nProporsi:\n")
print(round(prop.table(table(prediksi_final)), 3))
# TARGET: "yes" ~ 0.10 - 0.18

# ── 7. EXPORT ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
hasil_final_clean <- data.frame(
  id     = seq_len(nrow(test_final_sc)),
  y_pred = prediksi_final
)

cat("\nPreview 10 baris:\n")
print(head(hasil_final_clean, 10))

write.csv(hasil_final_clean,
          "Hasil_Prediksi_Dataset_B_FINAL.csv",
          row.names = FALSE,
          quote     = FALSE)

cat("\n[SELESAI] File berhasil disimpan!\n")
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# INVESTIGASI: KENAPA DATASET B BERBEDA?
# ============================================================

# ── Bandingkan distribusi numerik A vs B ─────────────────────
cat("=== PERBANDINGAN KARAKTERISTIK DATASET A vs B ===\n\n")

num_vars <- c("euribor3m", "cons.price.idx", "cons.conf.idx",
              "age", "campaign", "pdays", "previous")

for (v in num_vars) {
  if (v %in% names(data_train) && v %in% names(test)) {
    cat(sprintf("%-20s | Train mean: %7.3f | Test mean: %7.3f\n",
                v,
                mean(data_train[[v]], na.rm = TRUE),
                mean(test[[v]], na.rm = TRUE)))
  }
}

# ── Bandingkan distribusi kategorik penting ───────────────────
cat("\n=== POUTCOME (Hasil Kampanye Sebelumnya) ===\n")
cat("Train:\n"); print(round(prop.table(table(data_train$poutcome)), 3))
cat("Test:\n");  print(round(prop.table(table(test$poutcome)), 3))

cat("\n=== CONTACT (Jenis Komunikasi) ===\n")
cat("Train:\n"); print(round(prop.table(table(data_train$contact)), 3))
cat("Test:\n");  print(round(prop.table(table(test$contact)), 3))

cat("\n=== IS_CONTACTED_BEFORE ===\n")
cat("Train:\n"); print(round(prop.table(table(data_train$is_contacted_before)), 3))
cat("Test:\n");  print(round(prop.table(table(test$is_contacted_before)), 3))

cat("\n=== MONTH (Bulan Kampanye) ===\n")
cat("Train:\n"); print(round(prop.table(table(data_train$month)), 3))
cat("Test:\n");  print(round(prop.table(table(test$month)), 3))

# ── Distribusi probabilitas prediksi Dataset B ────────────────
cat("\n=== RINGKASAN PROBABILITAS PREDIKSI DATASET B ===\n")
print(summary(prob_test_final))

# Histogram probabilitas
hist(prob_test_final,
     breaks = 50,
     main   = "Distribusi Probabilitas Prediksi - Dataset B",
     xlab   = "P(yes)",
     col    = "steelblue",
     border = "white")
abline(v = best_t_final, col = "red", lwd = 2, lty = 2)
legend("topright", legend = paste("Threshold =", best_t_final),
       col = "red", lty = 2, lwd = 2)
```

```{r}
# Cek cepat nama kolom test vs train
cat("Kolom di train_final_sc:\n"); print(sort(names(train_final_sc)))
cat("\nKolom di test_final_sc:\n");  print(sort(names(test_final_sc)))
cat("\nAda di test tapi tidak di train:\n")
print(setdiff(names(test_final_sc), names(train_final_sc)))
```
